Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Select 'Merchant 2 for C112172' business unit using filter
Select '0828.210253 acquirer for gateway' acquirer MID within dialog
Select '0828.210253 acquirer for gateway Movable' acquirer MID within dialog
Verify that new Merchant acquirer is displayed and has Active status
Verify that new Merchant acquirer is displayed and has Inactive status
